caption:
Your missed-call text-back might be sending into a void.

In 2025, major U.S. carriers began blocking unregistered business SMS outright.

No delay. No bounce. No error on your end. The message just disappears.

This hits every automated text a service business sends: missed-call text-backs, appointment reminders, review requests, quote follow-ups.

The fix takes one phone call.

Ask your SMS or CRM provider if your business is registered under A2P 10DLC through The Campaign Registry.

Then test it: have a friend on a different carrier call your line, let it ring out, and confirm the text-back lands on their phone.

Want your follow-up system checked end to end?
DM "CHECK".

#SpeedToLead #ServiceBusiness #LeadFollowUp #SMSMarketing #HomeServices
rationale: Reels still lead reach for cold audiences, and this surfaces a genuinely unclaimed, verified carrier rule (A2P 10DLC blocking) that can silently break every automated text system this account teaches, with a concrete this-week test that requires no special tools.
